body:
**GAP - MISSING INTEGRATION:**
layout.tsx does NOT include Header, Footer, or BackgroundAnimation components.
These T2 shared components exist but are NOT integrated into the site.

Current layout.tsx just has:
<body>{children}</body>

Should include:
<body>
  <BackgroundAnimation />
  <Header />
  {children}
  <Footer />
</body>

Builder 2 should update layout.tsx or page.tsx to integrate shared components.
